questions.question_text: Dr. Al-Mahmoud is learning to 'conduct' complex heart surgery virtually. What does 'conduct' mean?

options.text: To watch and observe someone else performing a procedure
To carry out and perform an activity in an organised way
To evaluate and give feedback after a procedure is complete
To cancel and postpone a scheduled medical procedure

questions.explanation_ar: conduct تعني يُجري ويُنفّذ، أي القيام بنشاط أو إجراء بطريقة منظّمة ومدروسة.

questions.question_text: VR allows medical professionals to 'rehearse' procedures before the real operation. What does 'rehearse' mean?

options.text: To perform a procedure for the very first time without any preparation
To cancel and replace a planned procedure with a simpler one
To practise and prepare for a performance or procedure in advance
To evaluate the results of a completed procedure after the fact

questions.explanation_ar: rehearse تعني يتدرّب ويُمارس مسبقاً، أي الإعداد والتكرار قبل الأداء الفعلي لضمان الجودة والسلامة.

questions.question_text: VR is 'transforming' healthcare delivery across the Middle East. What does 'transforming' mean?

options.text: Introducing minor decorative changes to existing systems
Causing fundamental and significant changes in how something works
Maintaining existing methods while adding small improvements
Replacing all existing staff with automated digital systems

questions.explanation_ar: transforming تعني يُحوّل ويُحدث تغييراً جوهرياً وشاملاً في طبيعة شيء ما أو طريقة عمله.

questions.question_text: VR technology has been proven 'invaluable' for patient treatment and therapy. What does 'invaluable' mean?

options.text: Extremely expensive and beyond the budget of most hospitals
Having no value and not useful in clinical settings
Extremely useful and worth more than can easily be measured
Temporary and likely to lose its usefulness within a few years

questions.explanation_ar: invaluable تعني لا يُقدَّر بثمن وبالغ الأهمية، أي أن قيمته تفوق ما يمكن قياسه أو التعبير عنه بأرقام.

questions.question_text: VR budgets are 'allocated' by healthcare administrators to expand the technology. What does 'allocated' mean?

options.text: Reduced and removed from the organisation's total budget
Borrowed from other projects and paid back at a later date
Assigned and set aside for a specific purpose or project
Rejected because the cost was considered too high

questions.explanation_ar: allocated تعني خُصِّص ورُصِد، أي تحديد وتخصيص مبلغ مالي أو موارد معينة لغرض أو مشروع محدد.

questions.question_text: When medical institutions 'embrace' VR technology, they willingly accept and start using it in their work.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. embrace تعني يتبنّى بانفتاح ويرحّب بـ، أي القبول الإيجابي والتطبيق الطوعي لشيء جديد.

questions.question_text: When VR experiences 'immerse' students, the students feel distracted and unable to focus on their learning.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. immerse تعني يُغمر ويستوعب كلياً، أي أن التجربة تُحيط المستخدم بشكل كامل وتُركّز انتباهه — عكس التشتت.

questions.question_text: VR environments _____ patients to peaceful virtual spaces, helping them cope with pain during treatment.
questions.explanation_ar: transport تعني ينقل ويُوصل، وفي سياق الواقع الافتراضي تعني نقل الشخص ذهنياً وحسياً إلى بيئة مختلفة تماماً.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses a NON-DEFINING relative clause correctly?

options.text: The VR software which costs $500 is now available in stores.
King Abdulaziz University, which is in Jeddah, uses VR technology.
This is the device that revolutionised surgical training worldwide.
The surgeon who developed this won a prize last year.

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة الوصفية غير التعريفية (non-defining) تُضيف معلومة إضافية عن اسم معروف أصلاً، وتُحاط بفاصلتين. الخيار b صحيح — الجامعة معروفة بالاسم والمعلومة إضافية.

questions.question_text: Which sentence has a DEFINING relative clause (no commas, identifies exactly which one)?

options.text: Dr. Ahmed, who specialises in pain, works in Abu Dhabi.
Stanford Medical School, which conducted the research, is famous.
The headset that caused problems was replaced immediately.
This technology, which was invented in 1990, is now affordable.

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة الوصفية التعريفية (defining) لا تُحاط بفاصلتين وهي ضرورية لتحديد الاسم. الخيار c يُحدد أي headset بالضبط (the one that caused problems).

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly removes a non-essential relative clause using commas?

options.text: The new VR lab, which opened last month has thirty headsets.
The new VR lab which opened last month, has thirty headsets.
The new VR lab, which opened last month, has thirty headsets.
The new VR lab which, opened last month, has thirty headsets.

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة الوصفية غير التعريفية تُحاط بفاصلتين — واحدة قبلها وأخرى بعدها. الخيار c يضع الفاصلتين في الموضعين الصحيحين.

questions.question_text: In which sentence can the relative pronoun be omitted?

options.text: The surgeon who performed the operation was highly skilled.
This is the VR simulation which helps nurses practise.
The headset that I borrowed yesterday worked perfectly.
KAU Hospital, which is in Jeddah, adopted VR last year.

questions.explanation_ar: يمكن حذف الضمير الوصفي حين يكون مفعولاً به (object) في الجملة الوصفية التعريفية. في الخيار c، 'that' مفعول به (I borrowed it) لذا يمكن حذفه: 'The headset I borrowed'.

questions.question_text: 'Stanford Medical School, which conducted the research, found that VR improved surgical performance' uses the relative clause correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. Stanford هي مؤسسة معروفة بالاسم، والمعلومة عن إجراء البحث إضافية، لذا تُستخدم الجملة الوصفية غير التعريفية بفاصلتين مع which — وهو صحيح.

questions.question_text: Match each sentence to the type of relative clause it contains.

left_items: The VR headset that I bought last week already needs repairs.
Dr. Al-Mahmoud, who works in Riyadh, is a cardiac surgeon.
The research which showed 230% improvement was published recently.
VR technology, which costs less every year, is now widely used.
right_items: non-defining: adds extra info about a known subject (commas used)
defining: identifies exactly which thing (no commas, removable = sentence changes meaning)
non-defining: the subject is already specifically named (commas used)
defining: tells us which research is meant (no commas)

correct_answer.left: The VR headset that I bought last week already needs repairs.
correct_answer.right: defining: identifies exactly which thing (no commas, removable = sentence changes meaning)

correct_answer.left: Dr. Al-Mahmoud, who works in Riyadh, is a cardiac surgeon.
correct_answer.right: non-defining: the subject is already specifically named (commas used)

correct_answer.left: The research which showed 230% improvement was published recently.
correct_answer.right: defining: tells us which research is meant (no commas)

correct_answer.left: VR technology, which costs less every year, is now widely used.
correct_answer.right: non-defining: adds extra info about a known subject (commas used)

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة الوصفية التعريفية تُحدد المقصود بدون فاصلة، أما غير التعريفية فتُضيف معلومة عن اسم معروف وتُحاط بفاصلتين.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, by how much did VR-trained surgical residents outperform those using conventional training?

options.text: 130% better performance
180% better performance
230% better performance
300% better performance

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن بحثاً أجرته جامعة ستانفورد للطب أثبت أن المقيمين الجراحيين الذين تدرّبوا بالواقع الافتراضي أظهروا أداءً أفضل بنسبة 230% مقارنةً بزملائهم.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what is the specialty of Dr. Ahmed Hassan who is mentioned in the passage?

options.text: Cardiac surgery and heart transplant procedures
Virtual reality software development for hospitals
Pain management at a leading Abu Dhabi hospital
Mental health therapy and phobia treatment in Riyadh

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن الدكتور أحمد حسن متخصص في إدارة الألم في أحد المستشفيات الرائدة في أبوظبي.

questions.question_text: Passage B says VR 'transports patients to peaceful environments.' What does this tell us about how VR reduces pain?

options.text: VR physically moves patients to different hospital rooms
VR provides pain-relief medication through a built-in system
VR uses distraction by engaging the mind in an alternative experience
VR increases sedation through audio and visual stimulation

questions.explanation_ar: يُضمّن النص أن الواقع الافتراضي يعمل عن طريق إشغال العقل بتجربة افتراضية جذابة، مما يُشتّت انتباه المريض عن الألم الفعلي.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, burn victims at specialized centres in Dubai and Riyadh reported reduced pain when using VR distraction therapy.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص أن ضحايا الحروق في مراكز متخصصة في دبي والرياض أبلغوا عن انخفاض ملحوظ في مستويات الألم عند استخدام علاج الإلهاء بالواقع الافتراضي.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, surgical residents trained with VR showed _____ percent better performance than those using conventional methods.
questions.explanation_ar: أثبت بحث ستانفورد أن المقيمين الجراحيين الذين تدرّبوا بالواقع الافتراضي تفوّقوا على أقرانهم بنسبة 230%.

questions.question_text: Match each person or institution from Passage B to their role or contribution.

right_items: pain management specialist at a leading Abu Dhabi hospital
research institution that found VR improved surgical performance by 230%
hospital where students immerse in 3D anatomical models
cardiac surgeon who rehearses surgery using VR in Riyadh

correct_answer.right: cardiac surgeon who rehearses surgery using VR in Riyadh
hospital where students immerse in 3D anatomical models
research institution that found VR improved surgical performance by 230%
pain management specialist at a leading Abu Dhabi hospital

questions.explanation_ar: ورد كل شخص ومؤسسة في النص مع دوره بوضوح: المحمود (جراحة Riyadh بالVR)، مستشفى KAU جدة (نماذج تشريحية)، ستانفورد (البحث)، وحسن (إدارة الألم أبوظبي).
